inputs.name: q
inputs.desc: Query tensor [heads, tokens, head_dim] to be rotated in-place

inputs.name: k
inputs.desc: Key tensor [kv_heads, tokens, head_dim] to be rotated in-place

params.name: pos_offset
params.desc: Position offset for cos/sin cache lookup

params.name: rotary_dim
params.desc: RoPE rotary dimensions (only rotate first rotary_dim channels)

strategies.name: head
strategies.notes: Parallelize across heads; each thread handles one or more heads.

strategies.name: token
strategies.notes: Parallelize across tokens; each thread handles one or more tokens.

constraints.notes: Consecutive-pair RoPE used by llama.cpp for Llama-family models.

impl.c_declaration: void rope_forward_qk_pairwise_with_rotary_dim(float *q, float *k, const float *cos_cache, const float *sin_cache, int num_heads, int num_kv_heads, int num_tokens, int head_dim, int aligned_head_dim, int pos_offset, int rotary_dim);

parity.notes: Consecutive-pair RoPE should match llama.cpp Llama-family behavior.

notes: Rotary Position Embedding for consecutive pairs (0,1), (2,3), ... rather than split-half pairs.
